case_title: FANYA ELYCE YOUNG VS. TENTH AND MARKET, LLC.

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, FANYA ELYCE AS TO DEFENDANT TENTH AND MARKET, LLC. DBA   NEMA APARTMENTS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-26-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-26-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. 506 PLAINTIFF FANYA ELYCE YOUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TENTH AND MARKET, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NINA COOK, PROPERTY MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY YOUNG, FANYA ELYCE AS TO DEFENDANT TENTH AND MARKET, LLC. DBA   NEMA APARTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE REQUEST IS DENIED. [X] EXPLANATION FOR DECISION: SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENTS MAY NO BE APPEALED BY A PLAINTIFF; THE REQUEST IDENTIFIES NO CLERICAL OR CORRECTABLE ERROR.
DECLARATION OF FANYA ELYCE YOUNG FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, FANYA ELYCE
(SC-108) ANSWER TO REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT TENTH AND MARKET, LLC. DBA   NEMA APARTMENTS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2018 - JUDGMENT.
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, FANYA ELYCE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-18-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TENTH AND MARKET, LLC. DBA   NEMA APARTMENTS
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY YOUNG, FANYA ELYCE TENTH AND MARKET, LLC. DBA   NEMA APARTMENTS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, FANYA ELYCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TENTH AND MARKET, LLC. DBA   NEMA APARTMENTS $1,420.41 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,510.41, PLAINTIFF ENTITLED TO PRO-RATED RENT FOR NOVEMBER, 2016 (4 DAYS), STATUTORY DAMAGES PER CIVIL CODE 789.3 (C) (2) & DOCUMENTED EXPENSES INCURRED FOR HOTEL + FOOD EXPENSES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
